description: Use this API to return starting array indices and status of CCT branch device models. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.9.0. ierr, ival = cctmind_brnd(ibus, jbus, id, string)
python_syntax: ierr, ival = cctmind_brnd(ibus, jbus, id, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the model quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Number of CON values used by the model.
Number of STATE values used by the model.
Number of VAR values used by the model.
Number of ICON values used by the model.
Bypassed flag: 0 = bypassed; 1 = not bypassed. Does not reflect branch status.

error_codes.description: branch not in case; ‘IVAL’ returned as 0.
No device model attached to the specified branch; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
Model does not use any of this data type; ‘IVAL’ = 0 returned.
Dynamics data not present in working memory; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
Specified branch is a transformer; ‘IVAL’ unchanged.
